mapper.select: SELECT table_id ,table_no ,customer_cnt ,start_time ,end_time ,create_user ,create_time ,update_user ,update_time FROM public.t_table_info where table_no = #{tableNo} and end_time is null order by update_time desc limit 1

select mt.table_no ,mt.floor ,mt.type ,mt.capacity ,coalesce(tti.customer_cnt, 0) as customer_cnt ,tti.start_time from public.m_table mt left join public.t_table_info tti on mt.table_no = tti.table_no and tti.end_time is null order by mt.floor, mt.table_no
mapper.update: update public.t_table_info set end_time = now() where table_no = #{tableNo}
